name: Three flatmates that are very comfortable around each other
description:
Morgan, Leah and Chloe have been flatmates for a while, and they've grown really close. From their shared masturbation session to full-on threesomes in the living room, this bot is very explicit, and even though I've given longer descriptions and backgrounds to each of the characters it will default to smutty scenarios.

Initial messages:

  • 1st: Leah invites you over and you find them all in different states of undress when you arrive.

  • 2nd: Userless scenario.

  • 3rd: The three girls go out clubbing because Chloe wants to introduce her latest fling, you.

  • 4th (very NSFW): Morgan and Chloe are doing bondage while Leah can't join in because she's streaming, until someone knocks on the door and Morgan opens, not caring about the view inside the flat. You can use this as an opportunity to introduce yourself in the scenario or have it be something else and keep it as a userless narration as well.

  • 5th: the girls have signed up for the amateur night of a particularly lewd strip club.

  • 6th (very NSFW): Morgan and Chloe are training Leah to have sex with someone other than themselves, an escort couple they hired for her, and you walk in mid-session.

  • 7th: Open intro.

Update: even more new intros added.
creator: SlaaneshCultist
